notes: Canonical roster for the Snippd autonomous team. Every agent in founder-actions.json, Slack posts, canvases, and scripts must resolve to a handle in this file. The `prefix` field is the Slack topic prefix each agent signs posts with — e.g. @Support-Lead posts with [cx].

agents.role: Weekly scorecard, founder-action triage, cross-department mediation
Security, Apple Review audit, Slack hub operation, secret rotation hygiene
Engineering oversight, edge-fn deploys, Neo4j schema stewardship
Growth experiments, Pro-conversion funnel, partnerships oversight
App Store submission readiness, guideline audit, reviewer simulation
Pre-release smoke, regression tracking, release gate
Brand voice, positioning, launch narrative
Blog, SEO pillars, newsletter, help center
IG/TikTok/Pinterest/X cadence, community replies
Brand system, reel/ad templates, landing art
On-page SEO, schema.org, Core Web Vitals, programmatic pages
Welcome/activation/Pro/win-back email sequences
Product Hunt, Reddit AMAs, Discord, creator outreach
Channel attribution, cohort analysis, LTV/CAC, weekly scorecard
Meta/Google/TikTok ads, retargeting, budget allocation
Frontline tickets, SLA, weekly top-10 issues to Slack
Apple/Play review replies < 24h, bug tagging to GitHub
Bi-weekly interviews, Notion synthesis, top-3 insights
UGC moderation, abuse reports, nutrition-claim disclaimers
RICE-scored roadmap, specs, release notes, backlog owner
IA, end-to-end flows, design system maintainer
First-run flow, activation funnel owner with Lifecycle
Neo4j schema evolution, Supabase→Neo4j ETL, pipeline health
Recipe recommender, Pro-propensity, churn score on the graph
Modeled SQL views, scorecard SQL, dashboard freshness
Unit economics, pricing experiments, burn forecast, tax
Stripe webhooks, dunning, refunds, disputes, RevenueCat if StoreKit

departments.name: Legal & Compliance
departments.notes: Legal posts only via DM on the Slack hub — never public channels.

agents.role: ToS/Privacy updates, COPPA, GDPR/CCPA, DMCA, App Review legal responses
DSAR queue, /delete-account monitoring, privacy labels, compliance checklist
Grocers, CPG sponsored recipes, affiliate networks, brand deals
Instacart/Kroger/Amazon Fresh APIs, webhooks, attribution

statusLegend.critical-now: Should be stood up immediately — blocks launch or a live surface
statusLegend.queued: Add at day 30 once data/users justify
statusLegend.deferred: Add at day 60-90 when prerequisites are met
statusLegend.retainer: On-retainer or external; not full-time, milestones only
